text_blocks.text: trade magazine for the construction industry.
Each year, EUR compiles and reports on data
about the size of design and construction
companies. They publish a list of the largest
companies in the United States (Top-40) and
also a list the largest global firms (Top-250,
by amount of work they are doing outside their
home country). In 2014, EUR compiled the data
in nine market segments. It was divided as
telecom, hazardous waste plus a tenth category for
other projects. In their reporting on the Top
400, they used data on transportation, sewer,
hazardous waste and water to rank firms as
